Home → Demo Hub → Runtime Fleet

Full-fleet runtime capacity

Full 47,979-Agent Runtime Fleet

Scale to the full registered Agent Command Center fleet only through approved department gates, staged unlocks, circuit breakers, and kill-switch controls. 47,979 is the full fleet cap, not an automatic startup target. Department-gated activation is required. Staged unlocks are required. Raw activate all is disabled.

Total registered agents: 47,979 Total departments: 1,777 Full fleet cap: 47,979 Max cohort activation size: 2,500 Max operation chunk size: 500 Raw activate all: disabled

Safety boundaries

The kill switch pauses runtime activation; it does not execute rollback commands. No department can run commands, deploys, rollbacks, alerts, shell commands, or arbitrary actions from this page.

Kill switch ready Circuit breakers pause further activation

Agent Command Center, the demo pages, registry presentation, dashboard copy, visual layout, simulator materials, validator descriptions, and stakeholder presentation materials are protected project materials. No license, sale, transfer, or permission to reuse is granted by viewing this demo.

      
This site is a public stakeholder review surface. Some pages are static demonstrations, and some pages may be controlled backend-wired status, audit, readiness, approval, or export surfaces. No page enables raw activate all, arbitrary shell execution, arbitrary SQL, command execution, deployment actions, rollback execution, alert sending, or unrestricted automation.

      
Third-party names, platforms, and services referenced for context remain the property of their respective owners.
